pr.title: P2 page-specific fixes: team redesign, solutions consolidation, dark theme
pr.body:
## Summary

This PR ships design-review P2 fixes across eight pages (Team, Solutions, Partners, Careers, Polaris, Events, Resources, Clients) plus a platform-aware Cmd-K keyboard shortcut hint. All changes are code-only; follow-up asset and CMS row updates are documented in `docs/replit-agent-integration-brief.md` for the Replit agent to complete.

## Key changes

**Team page**
- Redesigned member cards: circular headshots (removed outer rounded rectangle), larger name/title/bio text
- Updated section eyebrow and footer link copy to "Team"

**Solutions detail page**
- Consolidated two separate "Related Resources" and "Related Content" blocks into a single `RelatedResourcesSection` with fallback auto-tagging
- Normalized all back-links to point to `/services-overview/default` (removed parent-service conditional routing)
- Improved method-alignment section: removed opacity dimming on inactive phases, refined text contrast and badge styling
- Shortened method-alignment lead copy (removed "This engagement" preamble)
- Fixed max-width constraints: prose sections capped at `max-w-4xl`, grids at `max-w-6xl`

**Solutions Overview**
- Updated GTM nav label from "Go-to-Market" to "GTM Strategy & Execution" in `lib/synozur-nav/src/index.ts`
- Fixed consulting card layout to prevent height snap on scroll

**Partners page**
- Switched from white background to dark theme (`bg-white` → `bg-background`)
- Updated text colors to use semantic tokens (`text-gray-900` → `text-foreground`, etc.)

**Polaris page**
- Removed Libsyn embed iframe block (featured episodes cards remain)

**Events page**
- Added new "Bring Synozur to your next event" section with three cards (Speaking, Workshops, Sponsorships) and CTA
- Moved contact CTA into the new section

**Clients page**
- Added new "Industries served" 8-card grid between logo rotator and case-studies

**White Papers page**
- Aligned listing container width to match Webinars and Library (`max-w-7xl`)

**Header**
- Platform-aware Cmd-K shortcut hint: displays `⌘K` on macOS/iOS, `Ctrl+K` on Windows/Linux
- Handler accepts both `metaKey` and `ctrlKey` for consistent behavior across platforms

## Notable implementation details

- The consolidated `RelatedResourcesSection` now accepts an optional `fallback` prop; if no manually-pinned items exist, it renders the fallback (auto-tagged `RelatedContent`)
- Method-alignment phase cards use conditional styling: active phases get `bg-primary/10` and full text contrast; inactive phases use `bg-card` and reduced opacity
- Platform detection uses `navigator.userAgentData?.platform` with fallback to deprecated `navigator.platform`; SSR defaults to Ctrl variant, client-side hydration switches to ⌘ on Apple hardware
- All dark-theme color updates use existing semantic tokens (`bg-background`, `text-foreground`, `text-muted-foreground`) for consistency

## Follow-ups (documented in integration brief)

The Replit agent will handle:
1. Solution icon replacements (PNG → transparent SVG)
2. Application logo upgrades (low-res JPEG → crisp PNG/SVG)
3. Service pillar icon updates (if any remain as PNG)
4. GTM solution row title alignment with nav label
5. Company OS capability copy rewrite (tone/structure consistency)

See `docs/replit-agent-integration-brief.md` and `docs/replit-agent-prompt.md` for full context, verification checklist, and read-only prod queries.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VJ24qrzdYNdo4kYoJu5y3y
pr.author: chris-mcnulty
